name: qwen-harness
description: A zero-dependency TypeScript agentic harness for local Qwen models via Ollama

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/config.test.ts tests/ollamaClient.test.ts tests/clientFactory.test.ts tests/connections.test.ts tests/compatClient.test.ts tests/jsonRepair.test.ts tests/tools.test.ts tests/permissions.test.ts tests/agent.test.ts tests/toolCallRecovery.test.ts tests/mutating-tools.test.ts tests/multi-edit.test.ts tests/gate.test.ts tests/orchestrator.test.ts tests/streaming.test.ts tests/session.test.ts tests/compaction.test.ts tests/memory.test.ts tests/secret-scan.test.ts tests/config-models.test.ts tests/preflight.test.ts tests/env.test.ts tests/repl.test.ts tests/permissions-store.test.ts tests/project-rules.test.ts tests/workspace-trust.test.ts tests/migration.test.ts tests/repo-hygiene.test.ts
